case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. SERGIO HUMBERTO VASQUEZ INTERIAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERIAN, SERGIO HUMBERTO VASQUEZ $1,836.19 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,926.19, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS IS SUBSTANTIATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, NO EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. JPT DAVID LAVINE, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
